name: larena/ui
description: Larena UI: Universal UI/frontend package for Larena smart components, backend-first rendering, hydration, design packs, UI asset graph, component registry, playground and frontend behavior contracts.

scripts.test: php scripts/test-placeholder.php && php tests/Unit/UiContractTest.php && php tests/Unit/UiFailsClosedTest.php && php tests/Unit/InMemoryUiRuntimeTest.php && php tests/Unit/FrontendRenderArtifactTest.php
scripts.test:unit: php scripts/test-placeholder.php && php tests/Unit/UiContractTest.php && php tests/Unit/UiFailsClosedTest.php && php tests/Unit/InMemoryUiRuntimeTest.php && php tests/Unit/FrontendRenderArtifactTest.php
